title: P&H High Court grills 'suspended' lawyer for challenging anti-sacrilege law passed by Punjab
description: The Punjab and Haryana High Court on Wednesday declined to pass any order on a public interest litigation (PIL) challenging the recent amendments made by Punjab Assembly to the anti-sacrilege law concerning acts against the Guru Granth Sahib [Simranjeet Singh v State of Punjab and Others]A Division Bench of Chief Justice Sheel Nagu and Justice Sanjiv Berry said it would first examine the maintainability of petition since the petitioner, Simranjeet Singh had failed to disclose facts about the cri
